title: ACCESS CENTER - 211info
text: PROJECT HOMELESS CONNECT ACCESS CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides meals, showers, laundry, temporary mailing addresses, clothing provisions, cell phone charging, TriMet tickets, shelter and housing referrals, and connections to various community partners and services. 1440 SE 21st Avenue Hillsboro, OR 97123 Eligibility: Unrestricted, with a focus on individuals who are homeless Hours: Center: Wednesday-Sunday 9am-5pm Meals: Breakfast 9am, sack lunches noon, hot meal 3pm Email (971) 713-3930 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (971) 713-3930 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Washington County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus 57 stops two blocks away. Use entrance at the east end. Services: Benefits and Services Assistance * Homelessness Issues Bus Fare Community Meals General Clothing Provision Homeless Drop In Centers Laundry Facilities Public Internet Access Sites Public Showers/Baths Specialized Information and Referral * Homelessness Issues Temporary Mailing Address Other Services Offered At This Location: CONSUMER REGULATION - IDENTIFICATION ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. PROJECT HOMELESS CONNECT
